mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXTVAL('account_seq')
INSERT INTO account (account_id, username, balance) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{username}, #{balance})
mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, username, balance, created_at AS createdAt FROM account WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT account_id AS accountId, username, balance, created_at AS createdAt FROM account WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY created_at DESC
